word: H484 - אַלְמֻגִּים - ʼalmuggîym - al-moog-gheem' - Almug trees

sections.paragraph:
Original: אלמגּים

Transliteration: 'almuggiym

Phonetic: al-moog-gheem'

BDB Definition:

  1. a tree from Lebanon, almug trees (sandalwood?), almug wood

Origin: probably of foreign derivation (used only in the plural)

TWOT entry: 89c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
